zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Metcalfe於1460年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾納帕時，他的父親Thomas Metcalfe36歲，母親Elizabeth Hartlington25歲。他和Margaret Pigott至少有6個兒子和6個女兒。他於1534年在英國越可爾文斯萊達爾被列為master forester: wensleydale, ryeydale, bishopdale。他去世於1539年9月20日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾阿斯可利格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Metcalfe于1460年出生在英国英格兰越可爾納帕时，他的父亲Thomas Metcalfe36岁，母亲Elizabeth Hartlington25岁。他和Margaret Pigott至少有6个儿子和6个女儿。他于1534年在英国越可爾文斯萊達爾被列为master forester: wensleydale, ryeydale, bishopdale。他去世于1539年9月20日在英国英格兰薩默塞特享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾阿斯可利格。

nameMeanings.name: Metcalfe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Metcalf
meanings: English (Yorkshire): apparently a nickname from Middle English mete ‘meat, food’ + calf ‘calf’, i.e. ‘calf to be fattened up for eating’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Metcalfe was born in 1460, in Nappa, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Metcalfe, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth Hartlington, was 25. He had at least 6 sons and 6 daughters with Margaret Pigott. In 1534, at the age of 76, his occupation is listed as master forester: wensleydale, ryeydale, bishopdale in Wensleydale, Yorkshire, England. He died on 20 September 1539, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79, and was buried in Askrigg, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Metcalfe est né en 1460, à Nappa, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Metcalfe, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hartlington, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles avec Margaret Pigott. En 1534, à l’âge de 76 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est master forester: wensleydale, ryeydale, bishopdale à Wensleydale, Everwyck, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1539, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Askrigg, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St. Oswald Church, Askrigg, North Yorksh: Askrigg, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Metcalfe 1460 in Nappa, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Metcalfe 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Hartlington 25. Er hatte mit Margaret Pigott mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1534, als er 76 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als master forester: wensleydale, ryeydale, bishopdale in Wensleydale, Yorkshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. September 1539 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Askrigg, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Metcalfe è nato il nel 1460 nel Nappa, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Metcalfe, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Hartlington, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie con Margaret Pigott. Nel 1534, all'età di 76 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come master forester: wensleydale, ryeydale, bishopdale nel Wensleydale, Yorkshire, England. Morì il 20 settembre 1539, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Askrigg, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Metcalfeが1460年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアナッパで生まれた時，父Thomas Metcalfeは36歳，母Elizabeth Hartlingtonは25歳であった。彼はMargaret Pigottとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。1534年，76歳の時，イギリスヨークシュアイアウエンスリーダルでの職業はmaster forester: wensleydale, ryeydale, bishopdaleと記録されている。彼は1539年9月20日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアアスクリググにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Metcalfe(이)가 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 나파에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Metcalfe(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hartlington(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Margaret Pigott(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1534년, 76세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 요르크실르 웬슬리데일에서 master forester: wensleydale, ryeydale, bishopdale이었다. 그는 1539년 9월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 아스크리그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Metcalfe nasceu em 1460, em Nappa, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Metcalfe, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hartlington, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas com Margaret Pigott. Em 1534, com 76 anos, sua profissão aparece como master forester: wensleydale, ryeydale, bishopdale em Wensleydale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1539, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Askrigg, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Metcalfe родился в 1460 г. в местности наппа, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Metcalfe было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hartlington, 25. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Margaret Pigott. В 1534 году, в возрасте 76 лет,  он работал по профессии master forester: wensleydale, ryeydale, bishopdale в местности венслидеил, еркшир, Англия. Он умер 20 сентября 1539 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности аскриг, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas con Margaret Pigott. En 1534, a la edad de 76 años, su ocupación registrada era master forester: wensleydale, ryeydale, bishopdale en Wensleydale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1539, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Askrigg, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
